film.title: Pyaar Kiya To Darna Kya
film.overview: A wealthy collegian falls in love with an heir apparent, but her domineering cousin orders her to end the affair.

dialogues.dialogue: /Oh ignorant lover /You don`t understand /You don`t agree /I`m ashamed /My body trembles /I`ve no control /On my heart /Don`t torture me /Come embrace me
/Oh ignorant lover /You don`t understand /You don`t agree /I`m ashamed /My body trembles /But you realize my life /Consent is hidden in denial When I left army for my children I didn`t know that
It`s insult of Thakur Veer Bahadur Amar Singh Rathore. As you say Thakur Veer Bahadur Amar Singh Rathore. Forgive them, they are ashamed spit your anger sir. Should I spit? Here comes the bull.
dialogues.target_person: Thakur Veer Bahadur Amar Singh Rathore
